en.title: Ready to plug Epistola into your product?
en.description: We'll review your templates, map the Common Ground payloads, and help you expose a render endpoint your orchestrator can call.
en.step1: 30-minute architecture review and template fit check.
en.step2: Concrete rollout plan tailored to your orchestrator stack.

nl.title: Klaar om Epistola in je product te integreren?
nl.description: We reviewen je templates, mappen de Common Ground payloads, en helpen je een render endpoint te exposen die je orchestrator kan aanroepen.
nl.step1: 30-minuten architectuur review en template fit check.
nl.step2: Concreet uitrol plan afgestemd op je orchestrator stack.
